title: Assorted Color Happy Retirement Latex Balloons (22cm) Pack of 10 - Perfect for Farewell Parties & Retirement Events, Purple
features: HAPPY RETIREMENT BALLOONS: Celebrate the next chapter in life with these cheerful and durable happy retirement balloons, perfect for adding a festive touch to any farewell party or retirement event.

ASSORTED COLORS: Brighten up the room with a variety of vibrant colors, including blue, red, green, yellow, and purple, to ensure a lively and eye-catching display that perfectly captures the spirit of celebration.

PERFECT SIZE: Each balloon measures 22cm when inflated, providing ample room for bold, legible text, and making them the ideal size for centerpiece arrangements or grouping to create a stunning visual impact.
PACK OF 10: This practical pack of 10 balloons allows for versatile decorating options, effortlessly enhancing your event's ambiance while providing you with excellent value for money.

PERFECT FOR RETIREMENT EVENTS: Crafted specifically for retirement-related occasions, these assorted color latex balloons make for a thoughtful addition to any celebration, bringing joy and memorable moments to the retiree, colleagues, friends, and family.
description: Product Description Create a fabulously festive party scene with these Latex Happy Retirement Balloons. Supplied in an assortment of bold colours, these balloons are a quick way to add bursts of colour to a retirement party. With "Happy Retirement" lettering printed on one side, these party balloons are designed to be filled with air and hung from the ceiling to ensure the printed text is right-side up. Whether they're placed individually throughout the room or bunched together in balloon bouquets, these latex balloons will be a cheerful addition to the celebration. Box Contains 1 x Pack of 10 Latex Assorted Happy Retirement Balloons
